name: Marc Maron
bio: Marc Maron is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for his confessional, neurotic style and for the long-running interview podcast WTF with Marc Maron, which ran from 2009 to 2025. A staple of the alternative comedy scene since the 1990s, he appeared more than forty times on Late Night with Conan OBrien, more than any other stand-up. He has released several acclaimed specials and starred in the semi-autobiographical IFC series Maron and Netflixs GLOW.

timeline.ev: Hosts Comedy Centrals Short Attention Span Theater
Launches the WTF with Marc Maron podcast
Releases special Thinky Pain; Maron premieres on IFC
Releases Netflix special End Times Fun

accolades: His 2010 Robin Williams interview added to the Library of Congress National Recording Registry (2022)
